channel.title: terraform on DaShaun
channel.description: Recent content in terraform on DaShaun

item.title: Active Geo-Replication in Azure Cache for Redis
item.description: Azure Cache for Redis Enterprise is GA Last week was a super high energy week for me. I was exhausted most of the weekend. This week, was more of the same. Azure Cache for Redis Enterprise (ACRE) became generally available (GA) on Tuesday. Microsoft made the big announcement during Microsoft Ignite 2021. For me, it was a big relief, followed by dozens and dozens of tests and validation.

item.title: Azurerm Terraform provider version 2.49.0
item.description: That new Terraform smell I’m a fan of Terraform. I like to stand things up from scratch, before I use them. I like to tear things down when I’m done. I’m also a fan of Redis Enterprise. (Yes, I am biased, because I work for Redis Labs.) Yesterday, version 2.49.0 of the ‘azurerm’ provider was released. Before yesterday, I needed to use an ARM template to deploy Azure Cache for Redis Enterprise (ACRE) clusters.
